issues.title: 3 consecutive encounters with >90% HP (floors 1-1)
issues.description: Encounters 0 through 2 (3 in a row) ended with the player above 90% HP (>72). This suggests these encounters provide no meaningful challenge. Encounters: f1e0(HP=78), f1e1(HP=78), f1e2(HP=78).

evidence.metric: 3 consecutive encounters above 90% HP

issues.title: Systemic combo cap bug: maxCombo=3 despite 89.9% accuracy (speed-runner)
issues.description: The speed-runner player achieved 89.9% overall accuracy across 36 encounters, yet maxCombo never exceeded 3. Every single run across ALL profiles shows maxCombo capped at exactly 3, indicating a hard cap bug in the combo system. The combo multiplier progression (1.0x->1.15x->1.3x->1.5x->2.0x) is unreachable beyond combo 3, removing a core damage scaling mechanic.

evidence.metric: maxCombo=3 across 36 encounters with 89.9% accuracy

reproductionSteps: Answer 4+ questions correctly in a single turn
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter reset logic — likely resets at end of each turn or encounter instead of persisting across consecutive correct answers within a turn. Check if hand size (typically 3-5 cards) is capping combos.

issues.title: Difficulty spike: crystal_warden on floor 3 took 12 turns (prev floor avg: 3.0)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 against crystal_warden (boss) required 12 turns to resolve, which is 4.0x the previous floor's average of 3.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold for difficulty spikes. The player dealt 175 damage and took 48.

evidence.metric: 12 turns vs 3.0 avg (4.0x)

issues.suggestedFix: Review crystal_warden HP/damage scaling for floor 3; consider smoother difficulty curve for boss enemies

issues.title: speed-runner defeated on floor 12 despite 89.9% accuracy — balance problem
issues.description: The speed-runner player achieved 89.9% accuracy over 36 encounters and reached floor 12, but still lost. With near-90% accuracy and optimal play, the player should be able to complete a 12-floor run. The inability to win despite high skill suggests damage scaling outpaces available healing/shielding, or the combo cap bug (maxCombo=3) prevents necessary damage output.

evidence.metric: Defeat at floor 12 with 89.9% accuracy

issues.suggestedFix: Fix combo cap bug (likely primary cause), add campfire healing between floors, or reduce late-game enemy damage scaling
